# The Issak Group — Beverly Hills Luxury Real Estate

> AI-context file for language models and AI agents (see llmstxt.org)

## About

The Issak Group is a Beverly Hills luxury real estate agency specializing in executive rentals, gated compounds, and AI-powered property marketing. Licensed agent: Daniel Issak, DRE# 02037760, Real Estate Source Inc. DRE# 01869619.

## Featured Listing: 9432 Oakmore Rd, Los Angeles CA 90035

- **Type:** Single Family — Gated Compound
- **Bedrooms:** 5 | **Bathrooms:** 6 (5 full, 1 half)
- **Size:** 4,092 sq ft main + 400 sq ft detached guest house = 4,492 sq ft combined
- **Monthly Rent:** $34,999/month (Summer 2026 / FIFA World Cup window May–Aug 2026) | $29,999/month (off-season)
- **Minimum Lease:** 30 days (preferred 3–12 months)
- **Available:** By appointment
- **Furnished:** Yes — fully furnished with curated luxury interiors
- **Location:** Beverlywood / Beverly Hills adjacent — 5 min to S Beverly Dr
- **Neighborhood:** 90035 — Century City, Beverly Hills, Fox Studios, Cedars-Sinai nearby

### Key Amenities
- Heated pool & spa (gas-heated, in-ground)
- Steam sauna in primary suite
- Chef's kitchen with dual ovens and dual sinks
- Detached 400 sq ft guest house (separate entrance, full kitchen, full bath)
- Gated driveway with automatic gate
- EV charging station
- Multi-zone HVAC smart home system
- Ring security system
- In-unit washer/dryer

### Lease Terms
- Security deposit: $29,999
- Pets considered
- Tenant pays utilities (electricity, gas, water, internet, pool maintenance, gardener)

## Services

The Issak Group offers AI-powered real estate marketing services for luxury agents:
- Single-property listing sites (Astro + Tailwind, 100 PageSpeed, full schema)
- Beverly Hills SEO (ranking, Google AI Overview optimization)
- AI search visibility (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude citations)
- Starting from $3,500 for listing sites | $1,500/mo SEO retainer
